name: jiangyue-skill-director
description: Codex skill plugin for designing, auditing, pressure-testing, and improving Jiangyue skills and skill-bearing plugins.

interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for creating, redesigning, auditing, pressure-testing, and improving Jiangyue skills and skill-bearing plugins. It routes work through skill-creator, superpowers process skills, and plugin-creator while preserving Jiangyue source boundaries and validation gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-skill-director to design a Jiangyue skill.
Use $jiangyue-skill-director to audit a Jiangyue skill failure.
Use $jiangyue-skill-director to plan a Jiangyue skill improvement.
